clinic.name: AuraCare Dental, Skin & Hair Clinic
clinic.address: 100 Medical Plaza, Suite 400, Beverly Hills, CA 90210

departments.name: Dental Department
departments.description: Comprehensive oral care, diagnostics, and advanced restorative treatments.

departments.name: Skin Department
departments.description: Medical-grade dermatological procedures, facials, and anti-aging therapies.

departments.name: Hair Department
departments.description: Clinical scalp treatments, hair restoration, and hair loss solutions.

departments.name: Laser Department
departments.description: State-of-the-art laser treatments for hair removal, scar revision, and skin rejuvenation.

departments.name: Cosmetic Procedures
departments.description: Non-surgical aesthetic enhancements including injectables, fillers, and peels.
departments.specialist: Dr. Sarah Lin & Dr. Marcus Vance

treatments.name: Dental Scaling & Polishing
treatments.description: Professional teeth cleaning to remove plaque, tartar, and surface stains, preventing gum disease.
treatments.safetyInfo: Safe for everyone. Mild tooth sensitivity may occur for 24 hours.

treatments.name: Root Canal Therapy (RCT)
treatments.description: Specialized treatment to repair and save a severely decayed or infected tooth, relieving excruciating pain.
treatments.safetyInfo: Performed under local anesthesia. Avoid chewing on the treated side until the permanent crown is placed.

treatments.name: Carbon Laser Toning (Hollywood Peel)
treatments.description: A non-invasive treatment using medical carbon cream and Q-Switched laser to reduce acne, open pores, and boost collagen.
treatments.safetyInfo: Extremely safe for most skin types. Wear SPF 30+ daily and avoid direct sun exposure for 48 hours post-treatment.

treatments.name: Chemical Peel (Salicylic/Glycolic)
treatments.description: Application of custom dermatological acids to exfoliate dead layers of skin, clearing acne and reducing pigmentation.
treatments.safetyInfo: May cause scaling and dryness. Strictly avoid picking peeling skin. Apply recommended moisturizers and sunscreens.

treatments.name: PRP Hair Restoration (Platelet-Rich Plasma)
treatments.description: Micro-injections of your own platelets into the scalp to stimulate hair follicles, boost density, and stop hair fall.
treatments.safetyInfo: 100% natural, utilizes patient's own blood. Avoid washing scalp for 24 hours and skip intense workouts on treatment day.

treatments.name: Clinical Anti-Dandruff Treatment
treatments.description: Exfoliating scalp scrub combined with therapeutic antifungal solutions and phototherapy to eliminate stubborn dandruff.

treatments.name: Full Body Laser Hair Removal
treatments.description: Advanced triple-wavelength laser targeting hair roots to inhibit growth permanently. Suitable for all skin and hair types.
treatments.safetyInfo: Do not wax or pluck 2 weeks prior (shaving only). Apply soothing gel and avoid hot showers for 24 hours.

treatments.name: Q-Switched Laser Tattoo Removal
treatments.description: High-intensity laser beams break down ink particles in the skin, allowing natural body elimination over multiple sessions.
treatments.safetyInfo: Will form minor blisters or scabs. Keep clean and apply antibacterial ointment as directed. Do not scratch.

treatments.name: Botox Anti-Wrinkle Injections
treatments.description: FDA-approved quick injections to temporarily relax facial muscles, smoothing out forehead lines, crow's feet, and frown lines.
treatments.safetyInfo: Do not lie down for 4 hours or exercise for 24 hours post-injection. Results appear within 3-7 days.

treatments.name: Hyaluronic Acid Dermal Fillers
treatments.description: Injectable gels used to restore lost volume, contour the cheeks, plump lips, and soften deep facial creases.
treatments.safetyInfo: Avoid blood thinners like aspirin for 3 days prior. Ice the area if swelling occurs.

faqs.question: What are your clinic timings?
faqs.answer: AuraCare Clinic is open Monday through Saturday from 9:00 AM to 7:00 PM. We are closed on Sundays.

faqs.question: Where is the clinic located?
faqs.answer: We are located at 100 Medical Plaza, Suite 400, Beverly Hills, CA 90210. Validated parking is available in the building basement.

faqs.question: How do I cancel or reschedule my appointment?
faqs.answer: You can cancel or reschedule up to 24 hours in advance without any fee. Please call our reception at +1 (555) 872-2273 or reply directly to your booking confirmation text.

faqs.question: Is laser hair removal painful?
faqs.answer: Our clinic uses advanced cooling technology that minimizes discomfort. Most patients describe the sensation as a light rubber band snap. It is highly tolerable.

faqs.question: How many sessions of Carbon Laser do I need to see results?
faqs.answer: You will notice an instant glow after just one session! For acne control and skin tightening, we recommend a package of 4 to 6 sessions spaced 2 weeks apart.

faqs.question: What should I do if I have a severe toothache?
faqs.answer: A severe throbbing toothache indicates a potential nerve infection. We recommend booking an emergency consultation with Dr. Sarah Lin immediately. You can rinse with warm salt water and take over-the-counter pain relief in the meantime.

faqs.question: Do you accept health insurance?
faqs.answer: We accept major dental insurance plans for restorative and preventative dental procedures. Cosmetic, skin, hair, and laser treatments are elective and must be paid out-of-pocket. We offer flexible financing via CareCredit.

faqs.question: Is PRP hair restoration safe? What is the downtime?
faqs.answer: Yes, PRP is extremely safe as it uses your own blood plasma, eliminating risk of allergic reactions. The downtime is virtually zero; you might experience mild scalp tenderness for 12-24 hours.
